creator: lehmann@ans-netz.de
text:
Hi,

this updat/port would not be work!

a) in src/utils.h the compiling stops with an error. When i compile it
normaly (without using the Port), it works

b) in Sylpheed 0.5.0 gettext requirements are updated to 0.10.38, but
there is no FreeBSD Port available (but why? 0.10.38 compiled on my
system without an error?!)

c) finaly sylpheed 0.5.0 can't compile without
echo "" > po/zh_TW.Big5.po
because, there is an error in this file, and Hiroyuki Yamamoto
<hiro-y@kcn.ne.jp> tells me to "fix" it so (because, i don't have the
time to find a proper solution)


Greetings
- Oliver Lehmann

--
